title: rubus aciphyllus
intro: Rubus aciphyllus, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to regulate blood sugar levels. The health benefits of Rubus aciphyllus are numerous, including reducing the risk of heart disease and cancer, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus aciphyllus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap the plant's medicinal and health benefits.
